nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Emberiza
nodes.summary: Emberiza（Emberiza）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联42种鸟类，如Cabanis's bunting、Brown-rumped bunting、Cape bunting等42种鸟类。

nodes.name: Brown-rumped bunting
nodes.summary: Brown-rumped bunting（Emberiza affinis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Brown-rumped bunting。

nodes.name: Brown-rumped bunting
nodes.summary: The brown-rumped bunting (Emberiza affinis) is a species of bird in the family Emberizidae native to the Sudan (region) and adjacent areas. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. References
nodes.shortSummary: The brown-rumped bunting (Emberiza affinis) is a species of bird in the family Emberizidae native to the Sudan (region) and adjacent areas.…
